creator: sheldonh@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Your How-To-Repeat needs more detail.  Since many folks have 
successfully accomplished what you're trying to do, this 
is likely a support issue.  That's not a problem, since 
we're willing to help, but you need to show exactly what 
you're doing (in terms of commands issued at the shell 
prompt). 

I'd suggest that you read /usr/src/UPDATING from the source 
you're trying to use.  Once you've read it, follow the 
instructions and let us know exactly which steps fail. 

Please submit your feedback to <freebsd-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.org> 
using the subject line of this message.
